name: Sugar-Crusted Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and peel the apples.
2. Combine flour, sugar, and cinnamon in a bowl.
3. Add the softened margarine to the mixture and cut it in with two knives or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
4. Brush each apple with egg.
5. Roll each apple in the flour mixture.
6. Arrange the apples in a greased, shallow baking pan.
7. Fill any cavities of the apples with the remaining flour mixture.
8. Pour orange juice into the pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until the apples are tender.
10. Serve warm with the pan liquid and top with whipped cream.
